title: Process Creation with Command Line Auditing

compliance.assurance_rationale: FedRAMP Rev.5 Baselines SI-4 System monitoring — process/command-line auditing is the canonical host-level input for system-monitoring correlation under FedRAMP.
FDA 21 CFR Part 11 §11.10(e) Audit trails — host command-line auditing provides the detailed, time-stamped record of operator actions Part 11 requires on Windows validated systems.
EU AI Act Art.19 Automatically generated logs — OS-level command-line auditing retains the infrastructure logs associated with high-risk AI deployers.
HITRUST CSF v11 09.aa Audit logging — command-line auditing supplies the detailed user-action log HITRUST lists as one of the audit inputs.
